currentLinkedIn.headline: Customer Success Manager at Deputy | Retention · Expansion · ANZ Portfolio | Sydney
currentLinkedIn.about: I look after the customers who keep the lights on. Four years in Customer Success — I focus on adoption, health scores, and making sure renewals are never a surprise.

experience.title: Customer Success Manager
bullets: Maintained 94% gross retention across a $4.2M ANZ portfolio of 80 mid-market accounts
Drove $620K in expansion ARR through proactive QBRs that surfaced upsell opportunities
Built a customer health dashboard in Salesforce that gave CS leadership real-time churn risk visibility

experience.title: Customer Onboarding Specialist
bullets: Onboarded 120+ SMB clients to global payment platform in first year; 97% completed setup within SLA
Created onboarding playbook adopted across Asia-Pacific CS team of 14
